description: Primary Activity Code: 5- or 6-digit NAICS code of the entity's primary activity
notes: 0 = N/A (branches) or inactive, except Edge/Agreement Corps and electric-power co-generators on FR 2009a/b/c

description: Authority Regulatory District (ARDF): 2-digit Federal Reserve district of regulatory authority
notes: Used when an institution elects a district other than its physical one (Regs D & I, eff. 1997-10-01); see DIST_FRS code map

description: Bank Count: derived count of U.S. banking subsidiaries in a BHC's structure during the row's date range
notes: Derived where BHC_IND=1, banking sub BROAD_REG_CD=1, relationship CTRL_IND=1

description: Bank Holding Company Indicator
Bank Type Analysis Code: special-analysis classification flag
Broad Regulatory Code: depository/legal status re Reg Y and BHC Act
notes: See code list BROAD_REG_CD; full statutory bank definition NPW PDF pp.7-8

description: Authority Charter: chartering authority
Charter Type
City/town of physical location
Conservatorship Code
Country Code (Treasury Geographic Classification)
Country of Incorporation Code
Country of Incorporation Name
Country Name (alpha)
County Code (FIPS 6-4)
notes: Meaningful only with state code; 0 = N/A (non-U.S.)

description: DB2 DATETIME form of DT_END
notes: Format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'; must be quoted in queries

description: DB2 form of entity commencement-of-existence date
DB2 form of final day of existence
DB2 form of date insured
DB2 form of date of opening
DB2 DATETIME form of DT_START
Federal Reserve District Code (physical) derived from state/county
Domestic Indicator derived from COUNTRY_CD
Date End: last date record info known valid (YYYYMMDD)
Commencement of Existence (YYYYMMDD)
Final Day of Existence (YYYYMMDD)
Date Insured: insurance effective date (YYYYMMDD)
Date of Opening: GL first opened / entity became active (YYYYMMDD)
Date Start: first date record info known valid (YYYYMMDD)
Derived entity type
notes: See code list ENTITY_TYPE (44 values, verified against NPW PDF)

description: Establishment Type Code: physical establishment scope
FBO/4C9 Qualification Indicator
notes: Whether an FBO is exempt from non-bank activity restrictions under BHC Act 4(c)9 / Reg K 211.23

description: Financial Holding Company Indicator
Date of Fiscal Year End (MMDD) for BHC/SLHC/FBO/other FR Y-7 filers
Financial Subsidiary Holder: bank holds a financial subsidiary per GLB Act / BHC 4(k)
Financial Subsidiary Indicator: non-bank sub conducting financial-in-nature activities per BHC 4(k)4
notes: Cannot start before 2000-03-13; see code list FNCL_SUB_IND

description: Functional Regulator of financial subsidiaries
IBF (International Banking Facility) Indicator
notes: See code list IBF_IND; earliest DT_START 1981-12-03

description: Primary ABA routing number (identifies the primary account, not the entity)
notes: Assigned by Accuity / FRB district; reusable across non-concurrent entities; no two concurrent entities share one

description: CUSIP ID (6-char issuer id; securities identification)
FDIC Certificate ID assigned to each head-office depository by the FDIC (no check digits)
Legal Entity Identifier: 20-char alphanumeric
notes: Issued by LOUs under GLEIF / LEI ROC

description: NCUA Charter ID (credit unions)
notes: 0 = N/A; 1-59999 Federal; 60000-79999 Federally Insured State Chartered; 80000+ Non-Federally Insured

description: OCC Charter ID (granted by Office of the Comptroller of the Currency)
notes: Since 2011-07-21 also stores national thrifts = thrift docket + 700000; 0 = N/A

description: RSSD ID: primary key of the entire database
notes: Unique one-up number with check digit, assigned by RSSD software at first entry; never changes, never reused; one per entity for its life; persists after closure

description: Head Office ID RSSD: the ID_RSSD of the head office of branches/agencies/non-independent facilities (EST_TYPE_CD > 1)
Tax ID: federal EIN (9-digit, IRS)
Thrift ID: OTS docket number for CHTR_TYPE_CD 300/310 that are FHLB members
notes: Field 9 chars but only 5 (right-most) used; 0 = N/A

description: Thrift Holding Company ID: OTS-assigned "H"+5 numbers for entities owning S&Ls / federal savings banks
Intermediate Holding Company Indicator
Primary Insurer: highest level of deposit insurance
FHLBS Membership Indicator (Federal Home Loan Bank System)
FRS Membership Indicator (Federal Reserve System)
Majority-Owned by Minorities or Women (>50% owned by minorities/women)
Legal Name as on charter/formation doc
notes: Leading "The"/"A" stored at end after a comma; branches store only branch portion; required

description: Short Name: abbreviated legal name for processing
Numeric Search Code derived from NM_LGL to speed name search
Organization Type: legal structure
Physical Place Code (incorporated/CDP places, county divisions, GNIS, etc.)
notes: Required pre-2003-06-01 for New England MSA derivation; 0 = N/A

description: Primary Federal Regulator
notes: See code list PRIM_FED_REG; can change over history; null for branches/non-bank subs; derived nightly

description: Province Region: territorial unit within a country/state of physical location
Reason for Termination of an Entity (head offices only)
SEC Reporting Status (1934 Act registration/reporting)
Savings & Loan Holding Company Indicator (FRS-regulated, eff. 2011-07-21)
notes: Entity controlling both banks & thrifts is a BHC not SLHC; see code list SLHC_IND

description: SLHC Type
Abbreviated State Name (FIPS 5-2)
Physical State Code (2-digit FIPS 5-2)
Home State (FIPS) of an FBO (IBA 5(a)/(b), BHC 3(d) home-state limits)
Abbreviated State of Incorporation (FIPS 5-2)
State of Incorporation (FIPS 5-2; implemented 2012-01-01)
Physical first street line
Physical second street line
Web site of the reporting company
ZIP / foreign mailing code of physical location
